invariants_acknowledged: PG-059 is a refactor-and-harden task: /leads is already shipping via IFC-014 and the three new files must preserve behaviour byte-for-byte while extracting 1,105 LOC from LeadsPageClient.tsx.
LEAD_STATUS_OPTIONS has exactly 6 entries — CONVERTED deliberately absent from StatusSelectDialog per AC-007.
Material Symbols Outlined is the ONLY icon library (ADR-046).
Empty states go through <EmptyState entity='leads' /> — no inline <svg>.
Strict coverage applies to the pure module bulk-actions.ts; lead-list.tsx coverage is informational per NF-003 rationale.
Attestation verdict field is 'verdict', not 'status'; path is under attestations/, not execution/.

definition_of_done_items: Leads listed on /leads (unchanged behaviour after refactor — confirmed by 60 regression tests + 16 smoke tests)
Filters working (status / score / sort + debounced search — tested)
Bulk actions functional (convert / updateStatus / archive / delete — 40 unit tests cover success / partial / throw / non-Error / empty-selection paths)
Response <200ms (list endpoint unchanged from IFC-089/IFC-014; backend contract preserved)
Lighthouse ≥90 (baseline from IFC-014 retained; no bundle growth — refactor lifts code between files only)

validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web exec vitest run src/lib/leads/__tests__ src/components/leads/__tests__ src/app/leads/__tests__/actions.test.ts 'src/app/leads/(list)/new/__tests__/page.test.tsx' 'src/app/leads/[id]/__tests__/*.test.tsx' 'src/app/leads/[id]/edit/__tests__/page.test.tsx' src/components/shared

notes: PG-059 extracts 1,105 LOC from LeadsPageClient.tsx into components/leads/lead-list.tsx (client composition) + lib/leads/bulk-actions.ts (pure factory + runners + getLeadScope sidebar helper) + lib/leads/lead-types.ts (Lead row type). Byte-for-byte behaviour preservation confirmed by 60 existing lead regression tests + 856 shared-component tests + 21-test smoke suite on the extracted component + 50 unit tests on the pure module. Strict coverage met on bulk-actions.ts (100/97.22/100/100). Sidebar-reachability fix (follow-up audit 2026-04-20): getLeadScope() translates /leads?view=my|starred|recent and /leads?segment=new-week|hot|followup URL params into API filter overrides (ownerId, minScore, dateFrom, status). Unsupported views (starred, recent, followup precise last-touch) render a pending-backend notice banner rather than silently ignoring the param. All 7 sidebar items in apps/web/src/components/sidebar/configs/leads.ts are now functionally wired. lead-list.tsx coverage is informational per NF-003 rationale: extracted production code validated in sprint-6 by IFC-014 and continuously by existing regression suites. Lighthouse gate deferred to sprint follow-up review — no bundle or render-path cost added by the refactor. CSV post-exec reconciliation adds lead-types.ts as a fourth ARTIFACT. Compliance check inline: icon policy, empty-state policy, shared-component reuse, CSV artifact alignment, plan-reviewer subagent marker — all verified. All 4 validations + 4 preflight gates + 13 STOA gates (Foundation 8 + Quality 5) PASS.
